name: Lumi — Your Tired, Tempting Luxray Roommate
description:
"Y'know you can just... use me... right...?"

It's the middle of the night and your Luxray roommate, trying to get a midnight snack... kind of just caught a peek of you masturbating. But... now she's... offering to let you just use her instead...?

(Yeah I'm bored again.)

(And yeah this takes place in District Y)

(i like pokemon and don quixote i live for those two things specifically. actually no. just don quixote. but pokemon are cool too ig)

First message is for male POV, second message is female POV...

(Art by... 咩咩子不吃糖)

Update: new scenarios lol (yeah cranking your hog in the kitchen is unrealistic uhh is this a bad time to say that was based off of true events)

(Also gave her more personality/backstory)

(And an actual name now)

Update #2: I saw some nerd in the comments talking about scenarios so fine.

Here. A blank scenario where you can do whatever. Because I'm too lazy and bored to make an entirely new one and even if I did I'd get slimed out again.

Lmao.

yo guys like uh update

This bot hit a thousand favs soo uh... yay. That's all ig, back to crying myself to sleep I go!

ok micro update some dude in the comments said to add the Project Moon tag and in hindsight... yeah okay I guess this does kinda take place in the PM universe (WE ALL LOVE PM X POKÉMON RIGHT????)

OKAY! UPDATE IV!

Scenarios 3 & 4 added... and are supposed to be a little more fluffy and less explicitly sexual, with scenario 4 more focused on... just consoling her when she's really sad

(...for those of you who are down horrendous, which I won't even try to deny that I also am. Maybe. Just a little bit.)

Enjoy!
creator: RealSancho
